inline_comments.message:
We don't seem to be using dmaapClient via configuration so far .. but what would happen this library is used?   The library uses jackson underneath and I suspect we could start getting ClassNotFound errors ?  Is that a correct assesment?

On the other hand, I think if there's no exclusion, the library would always be present and the new code you have added would not be exercised, it would use the jackson one default.

Is my assesment correct?   What are your thoughts Jim?

After merging, take a look through the non policy/common repos, since ClassNotFoundException is unchecked, can cause compiler errors if surrounding code catches exceptions individually rather than the generic exception.
